surgery_guide_01: the skin must not be cut
surgery_guide_03: the skin must not be open
surgery_guide_04: the blood vessels must be unclamped
surgery_guide_05: the blood vessels must not be unclamped
surgery_guide_06: the blood vessels must be clamped
surgery_guide_07: the blood vessels must not be clamped
surgery_guide_09: the organs must not be cut
surgery_guide_11: the bone must not be drilled
surgery_guide_13: the bone must not be sawed
surgery_guide_17: the prosthetic must not be unsecured
surgery_guide_18: the chest cavity must be opened wide
surgery_guide_19: the chest cavity must not be opened wide
